# Code Canvas

> Open-source, browser-based AI IDE with code editor, terminal, live preview, robotics flashing, Office editors, automations, and an agentic assistant.

Code Canvas is a collaborative coding workspace that runs entirely in the browser. It pairs a full IDE (multi-file editing, terminal, live preview, Git, extensions) with specialized editors for Arduino, FTC robotics, Scratch-style blocks, and Office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint). An AI assistant operates as a teammate across the project, and a workflow engine ("Automations") wires actions and integrations together.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, live stats, and entry points to the IDE.
- [Editor](/editor): The full Code Canvas IDE — file tree, editor, terminal, preview, AI assistant.
- [Documentation](/docs): Guides covering the IDE, AI assistant, automations, hardware flashing, and more.
- [Compare](/compare): How Code Canvas compares to Replit, CodeSandbox, StackBlitz, and other web IDEs.
- [FTC](/FTC): FTC robotics SDK in the browser — Hardware Map editor, ADB-over-WebUSB flashing.
- [Arduino](/arduino): Arduino & ESP support — breadboard visualizer, Web Serial flashing (STK500/AVR109/DFU/ESPTool).
- [Office](/office): In-browser Word, Excel, and PowerPoint editing with auto-save.
- [Automations](/automations): Trigger-first workflow builder with 70+ blocks and integrations.
- [Scratch](/scratch): Custom Scratch-style block editor with full .sb3 import/export.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Use](/terms-of-use): Terms governing use of the platform.
